description: Python package and command line tool that simplifies using the BioCLIP foundation model.
title: pybioclip
references: Stevens S, Wu J, Thompson MJ, Campolongo EG, Song CH, Carlyn DE, Dong L, Dahdul WM, Stewart C, Berger-Wolf T, Chao W-L, Su Y (2024) BioCLIP: A Vision Foundation Model for the Tree of Life. Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 19412–19424.

Gu, J., Stevens, S., Campolongo, E. G., Thompson, M. J., Zhang, N., Wu, J., Kopanev, A., Mai, Z., White, A. E., Balhoff, J., Dahdul, W. M., Rubenstein, D., Lapp, H., Berger-Wolf, T., Chao, W.-L., & Su, Y. (2025). BioCLIP 2: Emergent Properties from Scaling Hierarchical Contrastive Learning.
